description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.56.0

• 🏙 Now supports Hidaka City — You can now open Hidaka City from the top page. View your daily trash collection schedule (by town name), weather, and services all on one screen

• 🗑 Garbage collection dates shown by rule — Hanno and Hidaka city garbage collection calendars now display collection dates in the format "Every month, ◯th ◯day" (irregular items shown as date lists only). Course lists now include the relevant town names

• 🚻 Toilet search in Hidaka City — Find public restrooms, convenience stores, and train stations on a map, sorted by distance from your current location

• 📍 AED links to national AED map — Replaced the city's own AED page with a direct link to the nationwide AED map (aedm.jp). You can now access it from the services section in all city pages

• 🌡 Reference point for weather now shown — Temperature and heat index reference points (near ◯◯ City Hall) are now displayed, with added links to the nearest Ministry of the Environment heat index observation points (Hanno = Ōme, Hidaka = Hatoyama)

• Changed Hanno City page header from "Myはんのう" to "Hanno City"

• Fixed issue where clock was not updating on general city pages
